title: Legal Assistance. The Department shall provide free legal service to
content: 16 victims of illegal recruitment, trafficking in persons, and other related cases which are 17 administrative or criminal in nature in the form of legal advice, assistance in the 18 preparation of complaints and supporting documents, and institution of criminal actions. 19 20
